---
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: readable
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---
<center> 
<h1> Epper Eppes </h1> 
Conceptual Escapades & other Curiosities 
</center>

--- 

The name *epper eppes* is a nod to my dialect and might be translated as
*probably something*. The aim is to complement the erratic and ephemeral 
nature of my blog ([allokkio](https://danklotz.github.io/allokkio/)) by 
gathering more elaborate or thought-out things.

---

**Things to look at:** 

[Case Study: Aggregating Linear Reservoirs](reservoir_aggregation.html)
